prompt: Generate an 2D map of a new-designed mega airport. Use the clean illustration style, clear layout from the reference image to depict terminal buildings, boarding gates, roads, and runways.
prompt_refined: Generate a 2D map of a newly designed mega airport. Render the map in the clean, monochromatic, top-down architectural plan style observed in image 1, featuring crisp black line art on a white background with subtle grey shading for elements like roads and open areas. Ensure a clear, organized layout, akin to a detailed blueprint, that distinctly depicts multiple terminal buildings, an intricate network of boarding gates within or adjacent to terminals, a comprehensive system of access roads, and prominent runways. Include legible text labels for all key airport components, consistent with the labeling style in image 1.
objects: Legible text labels for airport components
